application_type.description: Whether the application is for a new name registration or a renewal of an existing one. Enum: 'new' | 'renewal'. Drives fee differences (the form header notes 'Filing Fee $20.00 per month, Renewal Fee $200.00').

entities.description: Entity name(s) the filing covers, as listed on the cover block.

home_jurisdiction.description: State or country where a foreign entity is organized. Distinct from entity.home_jurisdiction_name (the entity's name in that jurisdiction). Same key family as merger.<role>.home_jurisdiction. Documenting here as the first non-merger appearance of the bare entity.home_jurisdiction key.

physical_address.description: Single-line physical address (street + city + state + zip combined) of the entity's principal office. Used when the form provides a combined-address widget rather than separate street/city widgets.

formation_date_in_home_jurisdiction.description: Date the entity was originally organized in its home jurisdiction. Distinct from entity.original_articles_filing_date (which is Maine-specific).

business_purpose.description: Brief free-form statement of the nature of the entity's business. Used on registration / qualification forms that ask the entity to describe its activities.

certificate_of_existence_attached.description: Boolean: whether a certificate of existence (or equivalent) from the home jurisdiction, dated within 90 days, is attached. The page-0 FIFTH recital makes this mandatory. No AcroForm widget binds it — manual/process check.
